chain_definition.name: data-dictionary-builder-chain
chain_definition.description: Multi-skill pipeline to generate comprehensive data dictionaries from database schemas with validation, PII detection, and business context enrichment.

terminal_outputs.data_dictionary: Comprehensive structured data dictionary with all tables, columns, relationships, samples, and business context
terminal_outputs.validation_report: Validation report identifying missing descriptions, orphaned columns, naming inconsistencies, PII-flagged columns, and data quality warnings
terminal_outputs.output_file: Formatted output file (markdown/json/csv) if file output requested

coverage_report.goal: Generate a data dictionary from a database schema: column descriptions, data types, relationships, sample values, and business context for each field.

requirements.requirement: Connect to database and retrieve schema metadata
requirements.notes: Step 1 handles authentication, connection verification, and schema metadata retrieval

requirements.requirement: Extract and structure column metadata (names, types, nullability, constraints)
requirements.notes: Step 2 normalizes data types and extracts all column attributes

requirements.requirement: Identify table relationships and cardinality
requirements.notes: Step 3 detects foreign keys, implicit relationships, and determines 1:1/1:N/N:M cardinality

requirements.requirement: Collect sample data values from tables
requirements.notes: Step 4 queries representative samples and detects/masks PII

requirements.requirement: Detect and mask personally identifiable information (PII)
requirements.notes: Step 4 includes PII pattern matching and masking with configurable enable/disable

requirements.requirement: Gather business context and descriptions from schema comments and external sources
requirements.notes: Step 5 extracts schema comments and performs fuzzy matching against external documentation

requirements.requirement: Compile all metadata into structured data dictionary
requirements.notes: Step 6 assembles all inputs into final dictionary with configurable output format (markdown/json/csv)

requirements.requirement: Validate dictionary completeness and identify gaps
requirements.notes: Step 7 checks for missing descriptions, orphaned columns, naming inconsistencies, and data quality issues

requirements.requirement: Document data quality observations and patterns
requirements.notes: Step 4 identifies null percentages, ranges, formats, and enumerated values

requirements.requirement: Generate human-readable output in multiple formats
requirements.notes: Step 6 supports markdown, JSON, and CSV output formats

coverage_report.notes: All goal requirements are fully covered by the 7-skill chain. No gaps identified. The chain handles the complete workflow from database connection through validation and output formatting.

execution_plan.title: Data Dictionary Builder Chain - Execution Plan
execution_plan.summary: 7-step pipeline with 4 sequential layers and 2 parallel execution opportunities. Estimated total execution time: 8-15 minutes depending on database size and sampling configuration.

layers.description: Connect to database and retrieve raw schema metadata
Extract column metadata and build relationship graph (can run in parallel)
layers.parallelism_note: step_2 and step_3 both depend on step_1 but are independent of each other

layers.description: Collect sample data with PII detection and gather business context (can run in parallel)
layers.parallelism_note: step_4 and step_5 are independent and can execute simultaneously. step_4 may be longest due to sampling queries.

layers.description: Compile all metadata into structured data dictionary
Validate dictionary and generate comprehensive validation report

critical_path_analysis.bottleneck: step_4_sample_collector (120 seconds) runs in parallel to critical path but may extend overall execution time if not optimized
critical_path_analysis.optimization_opportunity: Configure sampling_config.max_table_rows to skip large tables and reduce sampling time

execution_plan.parallelism_diagram: Layer 1: [CONNECT] → Layer 2: [EXTRACT ∥ RELATIONSHIPS] → Layer 3: [SAMPLES ∥ CONTEXT] → Layer 4: [COMPILE] → Layer 5: [VALIDATE]

resource_requirements.network_bandwidth: Low to Medium (depends on table sizes)

execution_plan.execution_order_summary: 1. Connect to database (sequential, required first). 2. Extract metadata and build relationships in parallel. 3. Collect samples and gather business context in parallel. 4. Compile dictionary from all sources. 5. Validate and generate final report. All steps are required; no optional paths.

final_output.notes: The chain is complete and requires no additional skills. All 7 required skills are assumed to be available in the execution environment. The chain is optimized for parallel execution with 2 parallel opportunities (layers 2 and 3) that can reduce total execution time from ~180 seconds sequential to ~150 seconds with parallelism.
